task.title: Batch Cullet Weighing Screens
task.shortdesc: Click on the Batch Cullet Weighing tab at the top of the screen to display

ul.li: Status – provides an overview regarding the current weighing cycle of the scales
Formula - pressing the button opens a Formula screen
Consumption – the production data for today and the previous 14 days are displayed.
Timer - used to adjust scale and plant timers for the Integration system equipment
Preselection – used to select the active formula

p.b: Main Screen and Popup Window for the Batch Cullet Weighing Operation

step.cmd: Click on the Batch Cullet Weighing tab at the top of the screen to display the main Batch Cullet Weighing screen, shown below.
Click on the down arrow button to display the popup window to navigate to the following operation screens, which are shown on the following pages:

info.note: The Integration system screen also allows these operations, as well as others. Refer to SBS-OP-006 Operating the Integration System.
